overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a moody, moonlit medieval village at night. The character traverses muddy paths, passes wooden and stone houses, and walks along a wooden dock toward sailing ships in the distance, with a cool blue atmospheric color grade throughout.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through muddy terrain toward distant village structures, swords visible on back

entered.detail: Large moss-covered rock formation forming the right boundary of the path
Tall evergreen tree silhouetted against the night sky
Distant dilapidated wooden buildings barely visible in the fog
Jagged mountain peaks forming the horizon line
Two-story timber house with stone foundation and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, atmospheric wilderness area at night. Geralt walks along a muddy path bordered by a rocky cliff face on the right and sparse pine trees. In the distance, ruined structures and mountain peaks are visible through the hazy blue moonlight as the character approaches a wooden fortified house.

events.description: character enters the village proper, passing from open wilderness to built environment with wooden structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the village, passing close to a wooden house on stilts and turning slightly toward the waterfront

entered.detail: Traditional timber-framed house with stone lower walls and wooden upper floor
Tall masts of sailing vessels visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves into the village environment, passing a prominent wooden fortified house now on the left. The path narrows as stone and timber houses line the route. Distant ship masts become visible on the horizon, indicating the proximity to water, while the rocky wilderness fades from view.

events.description: character turns left toward the waterfront, revealing sailing ships in the distance
ground transitions from dirt to wooden planks as dock area approaches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the waterfront path, passing stone houses and wooden stairs, approaching the dock area with ships visible ahead

entered.detail: Stacked wooden barrels and crates along the path edge
Abandoned wooden cart with broken wheels
Beginning of wooden pier structure extending over water

segments.scene_description: The character follows a path along the waterfront, passing stone buildings with wooden stairs. The environment shifts from village houses to a working waterfront with barrels and a broken cart. Wooden dock structures become prominent ahead while distant sailing ships grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock pier extending over water

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto wooden dock planks, surface changes to weathered wood

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the wooden dock toward the water's edge, with sailing ships visible in the misty distance

entered.detail: Weathered wooden pier surface with visible gaps between planks
Partially sunken wooden vessel with broken mast
Rustic wooden lifting apparatus for loading cargo
Large tall ships with full rigging anchored in the bay

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place entirely on a wooden dock extending over dark water. Geralt walks on weathered planks past ship wreckage and wooden cranes. Large sailing vessels are visible in the misty distance across the water, while the village buildings recede behind. The cool blue atmosphere persists with moonlight reflecting off the water surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, moonlit wilderness into the heart of a coastal village and out onto a misty waterfront. It begins with Geralt walking along a muddy path between a rocky cliff and sparse pine trees, with ruined structures and mountain peaks looming through a hazy blue glow. As the character approaches a fortified wooden house, the wilderness fades and the path narrows, transitioning into a village lined with stone and timber buildings while ship masts emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the working waterfront, passing stone houses and scattered barrels before the terrain opens up into a series of wooden docks. Finally, the camera follows Geralt across weathered planks past ship wreckage and cranes, moving toward large sailing vessels anchored in the dark, moonlit water.
